steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The $y$-intercept of $y=f(x)$ is the value of $f(x)$ when $x=0$. Since $x$ represents the number of bracelets made, $x=0$ is the moment before any bracelets are made. Evaluate: $f(0)=-7(0)+49=49$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Maya used approximately 7 feet of yarn for each bracelet.’: 7 is the slope (rate of change per bracelet), not the $y$-intercept. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Maya had approximately 7 feet of yarn when she began to make the bracelets.’: again confuses 7 (the slope) with the $y$-intercept. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘Maya had approximately 49 feet of yarn when she began to make the bracelets.’: $f(0)=49$ and $x=0$ means before any bracelets were made, so this is the starting length of yarn. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘Maya used approximately 49 feet of yarn for each bracelet.’: 49 is the $y$-intercept (a fixed starting value), not a per-bracelet rate. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
